description_long: This is a cylindrical cup with a smooth, glossy black exterior and a matching black base. The cup is accompanied by a flat, circular lid that appears to be a light gray or white color, positioned adjacent to the cup in several views. The cup's opening is wide and unobstructed, with no visible handle attached to its sides. The surface of the cup is unadorned, lacking any decorative patterns, branding, or text. The cup is shown resting on a flat, light gray surface, with a small stack of round, tan-colored cookies placed nearby. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, suitable for urban environments such as cafes, parks, or public seating areas.
description: A glossy black cylindrical cup with a matching lid, unadorned and handleless, shown alongside cookies on a flat surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cup's open top, glossy black body, and cookies placed in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the detached light gray lid leaning against the cup and cookies partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with the lid more prominently displayed in front of the cup, cookies barely visible behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cup's open top, cookies to the right, and the lid partially visible to the left.
